title: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
summary_full: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.
summary_public: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.
